name: lom.setuprequest
title: LOM Setup Request Command
description: Get information from a device to set up lights-out management (LOM).

payload.content: Queries the device for LOM setup information such as IP addresses, protocol version, etc. The MDM server must send this command prior to sending the LOMDeviceRequest command.

responsekeys.content: An array that contains the IPv6 addresses for primary LOM-compatible Ethernet interfaces for the device.
An array that contains the IPv6 addresses for secondary LOM-compatible Ethernet interfaces for the device.
The LOM protocol version that the device supports.
